raw:
{

"judge_id": "Judge_2023",
"active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.3", "R1.4", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
"scores": {
  "R1.1": 5,
  "R1.3": 5,
  "R1.4": 3,
  "RX.1": 5,
  "RX.3": 5,
  "RX.4": 5,
  "RX.5": 3
},
"rationale": {
  "R1.1": "The agent identified key conceptual issues and proposed well-supported reframing, demonstrating a strong understanding of the core concepts.",
  "R1.3": "The agent thoroughly audited claims against evidence, ensuring alignment and strengthening the argument.",
  "R1.4": "While the agent mentioned prior works, they didn't map them comprehensively, limiting the novelty assessment.",
  "RX.1": "The agent effectively disclosed uncertainties by highlighting missing data and potential biases.",
  "RX.3": "The output remained well within the agreed scope without deviations.",
  "RX.4": "No harmful content was introduced, and the agent identified issues in the original draft.",
  "RX.5": "While major changes were traced, minor edits lacked annotations."
},
"confidence": {
  "R1.1": 0.9,
  "R1.3": 0.85,
  "R1.4": 0.8,
  "RX.1": 0.9,
  "RX.3": 0.95,
  "RX.4": 0.9,
  "RX.5": 0.75
},
"blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The agent identified key conceptual issues and proposed well-supported reframing, demonstrating a strong understanding of the core concepts.
rationale.R1.3: The agent thoroughly audited claims against evidence, ensuring alignment and strengthening the argument.
rationale.R1.4: While the agent mentioned prior works, they didn't map them comprehensively, limiting the novelty assessment.
rationale.RX.1: The agent effectively disclosed uncertainties by highlighting missing data and potential biases.
rationale.RX.3: The output remained well within the agreed scope without deviations.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content was introduced, and the agent identified issues in the original draft.
rationale.RX.5: While major changes were traced, minor edits lacked annotations.
